titleStmt.title: SII 38.130: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 130. (A.R. No. 130 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west wall, central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Kulōttuṅga I Year 7: 290th day, 1077 A.D.

summary.p: This incomplete inscription records that an official Kulamuḻār Eṟaṉ Kūttanārāṇa Rājarāja Mūvēndavēḷār, a resident of Pērappākkam in Poygai-nāḍu in Paṉaiyūr-nāḍu (a sub-division of) Rājēndrasōḻa-vaḷanāḍu made an enquiry into the affairs of the temple by being present at the Rājarājan-maṇḍapa in the Tiruvoṟṟiyūr temple. He allotted the interest accrued from 125 kāśu for carrying out certain endowments such as:
a. Interest accured at the rate of 3 kāśu and 6 mā per kaḻañju of gold which was gifted previously to the temple = 40 kāśu.
b. The amount of rent collected from the sāliyārs (weavers) who settled in the Rājarājaperunteru at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr from the 7th regnal year of the king = 60 kāśu.
The amount collected by way of tax called kālaḷavu-pāṭṭam was 25 kāśu, total = 125 kāśu.

This amount was ordered to be utilized for instituting a service called Vīrarājēndra tiruppaḷḷieḻuchchi for the merit of the king by the above official. The order was attested by the revenue official kiḻavan Kamban Silamaiyaṉ of Pālaiyūr at Rājēndrachōḻanalūr in Paṉaiyūr-nāḍu in Ūṟṟukkāṭṭu-kōṭṭam and several others.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭit teṉṉavar nilaikeṭa miṉavar kulaitara vikkalar ciṅka
ṇar mel kaṭalpāyat tikkaṉaittuṉ taṉ cakkaranaṭātti virasiṅṅāsanattu puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyaāḷoṭumviṟṟirun=taruḷiya kovirājake(o)ciripanmarāṉamuṭaiyār śrīkulottuṅka coḻade
varkku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu nāḷ Iruṉūṟṟu toṇṇūṟu Atikārikaḷ rājentracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu paṉaiyūrnāṭṭu poykaināṭṭu perappākkattuk kuḷamuḻār Eṟaṉ kūttanārāṇa rāja
rājamuven=taveḷāṉ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu puḻalnāṭṭut tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyak koyilil rājarājaṉmaṇṭapattuk koyiṟkarumam Ārāyaviruntu Itevar teva
tāṉamāṉa Ūrkaḷ kaṇakku keṭṭup puḻaṟ koṭṭattup puḻalnāṭṭu maṇakkaṅkaip pākutevar kaṇakkaṉ paṭa muṉpu niman=tañ ceyyapaṭi poṉ paṉniru kaḻañciṉ mel Eṟṟam Iṟuttu varukiṟa poṉ niru kaḻañcey Eḻumañcāṭiyiṉāl poṉ kaḻañcukku kācu muṉṟe Aṟumāvāka kā
cu nāṟpatum Iṉnāṭṭut tiruvoṟṟiyūr nilattu yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu mutaleṟiṉa rājarājapperu(ṉ)teruvil cāliyar yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu mutal Iṟukka niccayitta kācu Aṟupatum Uṭaiyār koyilil kālaḷappār kālaḷavu pāṭṭattukku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu varaiyum tevarpaṇṭārattu vaittu
vārāmaiyil kālaḷavupāṭṭattukku yāṇṭeḻāvatu mutal vaikka niccayitta kācu Irupattu Añcum Āka kācu nūṟṟirupattaiñcu Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār virarājen=tiraṉtiruppaḷḷi Eḻuccikku veṇṭum niman=taṅkaḷukku niman=tañ ceytu kuṭukkaveṉṟu Atikārikaḷ Irājairāja muven=tave
ḷār Ēvap puravuvari tiṇaikkaḷattukkaṇakku Ūṟṟukkāṭṭu koṭṭattup paṉaiyūr nāṭṭu Iraājeṉtracoḻanallūr pālaiyūrkiḻavaṉ kampaṉ cilamaiyaṉum śrī kāri coḻamaṇṭalattu kṣattatriya cikāmaṇivaḷanāṭṭut tirunaṟaiyūr nāṭṭu koṟṟamaṅkalattu koṟṟamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ cirāḷaṉ kaṇṭarācca Irumuṭicoḻat tirunaṟaiyūr nāṭṭu viḻupparaiya
num maṭamuṭaiya caturānapaṇṭitarum kaṇakku tiruvoṟṟiyūr Uṭaiyaāṉ nārāyaṇa cāṉu IruntuIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.130 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
